docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED DEC-11-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STEINBERGER, JOSEPH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK; S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2009 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT STEINBERGER, JOSEPH
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SICURELLA, THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEINBERGER, JOSEPH $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $605.00, THE COURT ACKNOWLEDGES THE LEGAL PRINCIPLES CITED BY DEFENDANT, AND FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF'S CAT, AS A LONG-OWNED PET LIVING WITH PLAINITFF'S FAMILY HAD AN EXTRAORDINARY VALUE TO PLAINTIFF WHICH EXCEEDS THE VALUE SUGGESTED BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SICURELLA, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT STEINBERGER, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
